archetype: Archetype 2: Performance Pro (Tactical Command Center Variant)
vibe: Cybersecurity, Tactical, Analytical, High-Contrast, Professional Training

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
hierarchy.h3_widget: text-sm sm:text-base font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-text_secondary
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase

rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Labels/Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do not use gray text on gray backgrounds.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.

platform_selection.description: Bento 'Tetris' Grid for high visual impact.

chat_dashboard.description: Control Room Grid for dense data and chat.

spans.analysis_pane: col-span-1 lg:col-span-5 h-full flex flex-col gap-4

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-white transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-transparent border border-red_flag text-red_flag hover:bg-red_flag hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.ghost: text-text_secondary hover:text-white hover:bg-surface_elevated transition-colors px-4 py-2 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-bold

chat_bubbles.user: bg-surface_elevated border border-border text-white px-4 py-3 rounded-none self-end max-w-[80%]
chat_bubbles.bot: bg-transparent border-l-2 border-primary pl-4 py-2 text-text_secondary self-start max-w-[80%]

analysis_widgets.score_circle: Use Recharts or SVG to create a radial progress bar. Stroke color depends on score (Red/Amber/Green). Track is dark gray.
analysis_widgets.flag_item: flex items-start gap-3 p-4 border border-border bg-surface

inputs.chat_input: bg-surface border border-border text-white rounded-none px-4 py-3 w-full focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none transition-all

animations.score_reveal: Number counting up smoothly (framer-motion or react-spring).

platform_background.description: Abstract geometric lines and shapes on black background. Use as a low-opacity texture behind the platform selection screen.

stranger_avatar.description: Person wearing hoodie in shadows. Use as the avatar for the AI stranger in the chat.
stranger_avatar.usage: Use in an Avatar component with a square, hard-edged frame (rounded-none), grayscale with red hover effect.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Import 'Azeret Mono' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS.
STRICT COMPONENT RULES: Do NOT use rounded corners (rounded-md/lg/xl). This design uses sharp edges (rounded-none) for a technical/tactical feel.
COLOR APPLICATION: Do not use default Tailwind colors (blue-500, red-500). Use the exact semantic HEX codes provided in this JSON.
LAYOUT ENFORCEMENT: The Chat screen must be a strict height (h-screen minus header), so the chat pane scrolls internally and the analysis pane remains fixed on the right.
TESTING: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, input fields, and major layout sections.
